column1: # Sync ledger — which published HTML page distills which working markdown.
# The HTML is a deliberate *distillation*, not a word-for-word conversion, so we
# don't auto-generate it. Instead this ledger records the commit at which each page
# was last reconciled with its sources; `tools/sync-check.sh` reports when a source
# has changed since — i.e. when a page is due for a re-read.
